gsx$ability:
When equipped Creature deals damage to an Uninfected Creature, Infect that Creature.
When the equipped Creature is destroyed while engaged, destroy all Battlegear equipped to the opposing engaged Creature. Then, if that Creature is Unequipped, equip Danian carapace to it.
(Players control any Battlegear equipped to Creatures they control.)

Equipped Creature has an additional 5 Energy and 15 Power.
Equipped Elementalist Creature has all Elemental Types your Creatures have.

When Ice Cloak is flipped face-up, if equipped Creature is engaged with a Creature with Fire, equipped Creature gains 10 Energy.
Equipped Creature has "Fireproof 10."

Equipped Creature has Creature Type "Mandiblor" in addition to its other types.
Equipped Creature has "Hive: equipped Creature has an additional 5 Energy."

Equipped Creature has an additional 5 Energy and 15 Wisdom.
Equipped Scout Creature has "{{MC}}: Turn target face-down Battlegear face-up."
When Hive is activated, the next time an Attack would resolve this turn, it deals 10 damage instead of its normal damage.
When Supercharged Alterant is flipped face-up, choose a Discipline. Equipped Creature gains 100 in the chosen Discipline.

Equipped Creature has an additional 5 Energy and 15 Speed.
Equipped Warrior Creature has "When equipped Creature deals 20 or more attack damage, deal 5 damage to target Creature."
When Telebracers is flipped face-up, reveal a new active Location.

Equipped Creature has "Earth 5" and "Recklessness 5."
If equipped Creature is destroyed while engaged, destroy all Battlegear equipped to the opposing engaged Creature. Then, if that Creature is Unequipped, equip Ur-Shard to it.
(Players control any Battlegear equipped to Creatures they control.)

Equipped Creature cannot be targeted by abilities.
This Battlegear begins the game face-up.

Equipped Creature can play Mugic of any tribe.
When a Mugic or ability is played by equipped Creature, deal 10 damage to it.

If equipped Creature is a Conjuror Creature, Warbeast Creatures you control have "Recklessness 5."
When equipped Creature deals Air damage, you can look at the top four cards of your Attack Deck and put them back on top in any order.
Adjacent Creatures to equipped Creature must move into its space if able.
Equipped Creature has "Discard a Mugic Card: Relocate target opposing unengaged Creature to any unoccupied space adjacent to this Creature."
Equipped Creature has "Outperform Speed 5." (Outperform increases the damage of attacks that success at least one Stat Check, Challenge, or Stat Fail of the indicated Discipline.)

Equipped Creature has "Outperform Power 5." (Outperform increases the damage of attacks that success at least one Stat Check, Challenge, or Stat Fail of the indicated Discipline.)

When equipped Creature wins combat, put a Mugic counter on it.

Sacrifice Hive Amber: Activate Hive.
If Hive Amber is in your general discard pile, when a Mandiblor Creature you control leaves play, you can return Hive Amber to play equipped to an Unequipped Creature you control.

Equipped Creature has an additional 50 Energy.
When equipped Creature is dealt 15 or more attack damage, the next attack played by the equipped Creature this turn deals 0 damage.

Equipped Creature has an additional 10 Wisdom.

Equipped Creature has an additional 10 Energy.
When a source controlled by an opponent reduces any of equipped Creature's Disciplines, Mindclasp deals 5 damage to target engaged Creature.
When a Mugic Card is put into a general discard pile, discard an Attack Card and draw an Attack Card.

Equipped Creature has an additional 10 Courage.

gsx$name: Kha'rall Shard of the Tidal Crest
gsx$ability:
Equipped M'arrillian or Minion Creature has "Water 5."
At the beginning of combat, equipped Kha'rall Creature gains 40 Energy if there are 8 or more Mugic counters among Creatures you control.
This Battlegear begins the game face-up.

Attacks played by equipped Creature also count as Water attacks.
When Liquid Thought Evaporator is flipped face-down, put a Mugic counter on the equipped Fluidmorpher Creature.

Creatures engaged with equipped Creature fail all Challenges on attacks they play.
Equipped Creature takes 10 less damage from Mugic.
Sacrifice Vial of Liquid Thought: Return an Attack Card from your Attack Discard pile to your hand. If you do, place one Attack Card from your hand on the bottom of your Attack Deck.
If equipped Creature moved this turn, at the beginning of combat reveal a new active Location.
gsx$flavortext: If Blazier would only stop mapping new lands and look over his collection, he would discover that he has already found what he's been searching for his entire life.

gsx$ability:
Equipped Creature has an additional 20 Speed. 
If an opposing Creature has Range, equipped Creature has "Defender."
This Battlegear begins the game face-up.
gsx$flavortext: A marvel of engineering, the Bronzeflight can travel from Mipedim Oasis to Mount Pillar on a single charge.

gsx$ability:
Stat Check Power 50: equipped Creature has an additional 5 Energy.
Stat Check Power 75: equipped Creature has "Intimidate: Energy 10."
gsx$flavortext: What takes 20 to wield, Rothar swings with one arm!

gsx$ability: If equipped Creature has moved and won a combat this turn, it may move a second time, this move may begin an additonal combat
gsx$flavortext: The Dread Tread can rip through Kiru City's "impenetrable" walls as if they were made of paper.

gsx$ability:
Stat Check Courage 50: equipped Creature has an additional 5 Energy.

gsx$flavortext: The perfect combination of weight, durability and flexibility.

gsx$flavortext: Infused with the spirits of warriors past, the luminescent glow intensifies whenever it senses an intruder nearby.

gsx$ability:

gsx$flavortext: To aid in the war, Ikkatosh proved he would give part of himself... literally!

gsx$ability:
Equipped Creature has an additional 50 Speed.

gsx$flavortext: Raznus's favorite transport before his unfortunate transformation.

gsx$ability:
Sacrifice Mipedian Balladeers' Flute: Put a Mugic counter on the equipped Creature. Your opponent can put a Mugic counter on a Creature of their choice.
This Battlegear begins the game face-up.
gsx$flavortext: Melodies, harmonies, cacophonies: Mugicians love all music without prejudice.

gsx$ability:
Equipped Creature has Fire. 
Sacrifice Obliterators: Deal 5 damage to target Creature. Play this ability only while you control Dread Tread.
gsx$flavortext: It's the perfect war machine: the Obliterators annihilate anything the Dread Tread fails to steamroll.

gsx$ability: Sacrifice Ozlai's Wreck: Destroy target Battlegear equipped to an engaged Creature.
gsx$flavortext: Though Ozlai named "The Wreck" after what it can do to other vehicles, many believe that it's named after his state of mind.

gsx$ability:
Stat Check Speed 50: equipped Creature has an additional 5 Energy.
Stat Check Speed 75: When equipped Creature takes 20 or more damage from a single source, deal 5 damage to the opposing engaged Creature.
Sacrifice Sahrnokk: Creatures cannot end their move in equipped Creature's space.
gsx$flavortext: As Ørth whizzed by Gespedan to win the race and their wager, Gespedan regretted agreeing to give Ørth naming rights to his next child.

gsx$ability: If engaged with an Infected Creature, equipped Creature has "Outperform all Disciplines 5."
gsx$flavortext: The parasites proved once again that determination trumps size every time.

gsx$ability:
Equipped Creature has an additional 15 Courage.

gsx$flavortext: Seeing its sharpness, even the most courageous lose heart... just before they lose their heads.

gsx$flavortext: Even the most unimaginative Mipedians thought the name was too "on-the-nose."

gsx$flavortext: As ephemeral as dreams and just as cherished.

gsx$ability: Equipped Creature has an additional 40 Courage and 5 Energy.
gsx$flavortext:
"Total control and domination!? You are fools! Control is an illusion... and that is why you will fail." 
—Lore

gsx$ability: Equipped Creature deals an additional 10 damage with non-Elemental and non-Discipline Attacks.

gsx$flavortext: For true leaders, the crown does not define the king. The king defines the crown.

gsx$ability: When General's Standard is flipped face-up, choose a Tribe. Equipped Creature is considered to belong to that Tribe while General's Standard is face-up. (This ability does not end at the end of the turn.)
At the beginning of combat, equipped Creature loses all abilities and gains or loses Courage, Power, Wisdom, Speed and Energy to make those values 70.
Equipped Creature has an additional 40 Speed and 5 Energy.
gsx$flavortext:
"I never expected to see an UnderWorlder wearing the emblem of our noble Mipedian ancestors. And I've never been happier." 
—Tiaane

gsx$ability: Equipped Creature has an additional 40 Power and 5 Energy.
gsx$flavortext: The handle hides a trigger that instantly doubles the length of the blade. Naturally, Khybon has not told anyone about this feature.

gsx$flavortext: The air crackled and sizzled, as did the enemy.

gsx$flavortext: Though Mugicians may appear to love one tribe's music over another, the fact remains they they love all music equally.
